records.question: Which stations in Palo Alto have at least 23 docks, a latitude of at most 37.443988, a longitude exactly at -122.164759, and were installed on 8/14/2013?

records.question: Which stations named Castro Street and El Camino Real in Mountain View were installed on 12/31/2013 and have a longitude of at least -122.083678?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.long >= -122.083678 AND station.city = 'Mountain View' AND station.installation_date = '12/31/2013' AND station.name = 'Castro Street and El Camino Real'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id 
FROM station 
WHERE name IN ('Castro Street', 'El Camino Real') 
  AND city = 'Mountain View' 
  AND installation_date = '12/31/2013' 
  AND long >= -122.083678

records.question: Which stations named exactly Embarcadero at Vallejo have at least 15 docks?

JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'Embarcadero at Vallejo' AND station.dock_count >= 15

records.question: Which stations named Santa Clara County Civic Center, installed exactly on 12/31/2013, have latitude at least 37.352601 and longitude at least -121.90573300000001, with docks available at least 15 since 2015-06-02 12:57:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.installation_date = '12/31/2013' AND station.lat >= 37.352601 AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 12:57:02' AND station.long >= -121.90573300000001 AND status.docks_available >= 15 AND station.name = 'Santa Clara County Civic Center'

SELECT s.id
FROM station s
JOIN status st ON s.id = st.station_id
WHERE s.name = 'Santa Clara County Civic Center'
  AND s.installation_date = '2013-12-31'
  AND s.lat >= 37.352601

records.question: Which stations named 2nd at South Park have exactly 4 docks available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = '2nd at South Park' AND status.docks_available = 4
